<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Selpercatinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Retsevmo as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adults with:&nbsp;– advanced RET fusion positive non small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) not previously treated with a RET inhibitor– advanced RET...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.2%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.2%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.0%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（99.0%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（98.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（97.7%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（97.3%）</li>
<li>idiopathic pulmonary arterial hypertension（97.0%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（97.0%）</li>
<li>coxopodopatellar syndrome（96.9%）</li>
<li>familial clubfoot due to 17q23.1q23.2 microduplication（96.9%）</li>
<li>chromosome 17q23.1-q23.2 deletion syndrome（96.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary（96.8%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（96.6%）</li>
<li>idiopathic and/or familial pulmonary arterial hypertension（96.3%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（96.2%）</li>
<li>gastrointestinal hamartoma（96.2%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension（96.1%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（96.0%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（96.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/selpercatinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
